headline: InterDigital Q1 Earnings Surpass Estimates Despite Lower Y/Y Revenues
summary: IDCC beats Q1 estimates as licensing growth holds firm, but weaker smartphone revenues, lower catch-up sales and rising costs pressure result.

headline: Monolithic Power's Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Solid Revenue Growth
summary: MPWR beats Q1 estimates as AI-driven enterprise data demand fuels 26% revenue growth, with strong gains in communications and networking segments.
